records.summary: A well-structured commercial locksmith overview page with clear CTAs, Google reviews widget, and navigation to dedicated sub-service pages. Serves as a hub linking out to emergency, safe, burglary, and lock change pages.
records.topOpportunity: Minimal — page is well-organised; could potentially improve with before/after work photos or case studies
records.notes: This is a cold lead — the site has strong service architecture, dedicated sub-pages per category, and clear emergency vs scheduled distinction.

records.summary: Dedicated emergency commercial locksmith page with detailed service descriptions, FAQs, social proof, partner logos, and multiple CTAs. Clearly distinguishes emergency and scheduled work.
servicesListed: uPVC door and window lock repairs
records.topOpportunity: Possibly before/after work photography; testimonial videos use stock avatars which weakens trust
records.notes: Cold lead — page is comprehensive, well-structured, and conversion-optimised with FAQs, pricing anchor, and multiple contact channels.

records.summary: Dedicated residential emergency locksmith page covering 24/7 lockouts, lost keys, and urgent lock changes, with DBS-checked credentials, FAQs, and clear pricing signals. Mirrors commercial page structure closely.
servicesListed: uPVC door and window lock repairs
records.topOpportunity: Actual before/after job photography would strengthen trust; testimonial profiles use stock imagery
records.notes: Cold lead — page is well-built with strong SEO intent targeting, FAQ section, and clear emergency framing throughout.

records.summary: Dedicated scheduled-service page for residential lock changes, broken down into uPVC, timber/composite, and post-incident scenarios with clear bullet-point descriptions and FAQs. Well-differentiated from emergency content.
records.topOpportunity: Real job photography or a lock comparison visual would add conversion value; testimonial section uses stock photos
records.notes: Cold lead — page demonstrates strong service segmentation with use-case-based sub-sections and a comprehensive FAQ addressing objections.

records.summary: Dedicated safe locksmith page covering non-destructive opening, repairs, code replacement, installation, and removal, with detailed FAQs and strong trust signals. Clearly focused on a niche service.
records.topOpportunity: Real safe job photography or a short explainer video would differentiate; testimonial videos link to YouTube but use generic avatars
records.notes: Cold lead — the site as a whole is a well-executed, professionally structured locksmith web presence with very limited gaps for a web agency to exploit.
